# icns

**Type Property**

A type that represents Apple icon data.

## Declaration

```swift
static var icns: UTType { get }
```

## Discussion

The identifier for this type is `com.apple.icns`.

This type conforms to [doc://com.apple.uniformtypeidentifiers/documentation/UniformTypeIdentifiers/UTTypeImage].

## Icon images

- **ico**: A type that represents Windows icon data.
